song.title: Father, I Adore You
song.lyrics: [V1] .C Dm7 G C Father, I adore You, . C Dm7 G C And I lay my life before You. .C Dm7 G C How I love You. [V2] Jesus, I adore You, And I lay my life before You. How I love You. [V3] Spirit, I adore You, And I lay my life before You. How I love You. [V4] Trinity, I adore You, And I lay my life before You. How I love You.
